trivia_bullets.text: Duskmourn's haunted mansion warps and corrupts those trapped inside under Valgavoth's influence. The fungal body-horror archetype in the art continues an MTG tradition across horror sets (Innistrad delirium, Phyrexian contagion).
No flavor text on the printed card; the art carries the narrative weight.

A {1}{B} Aura with dual ETB removal: on entry an opponent sacrifices a creature (not the enchanted one); then whenever the enchanted creature is dealt any damage, it is destroyed regardless of toughness — turning any combat into a kill shot. EDHREC rank 12,120 as of 2026-05-19.
Penny Dreadful legal with penny rank 347 — indicating genuine rotational Penny Dreadful play, unusually high for a set-specific uncommon Aura.

Artist Warren Mahy is a New Zealand-born illustrator who worked as a concept designer at Weta Workshop on Lord of the Rings and King Kong before transitioning to game illustration. His MTG career spans 124+ cards and includes celebrated Goblin art (Goblin Guide).
